name: propintel-ai
description: PropIntel AI - AI Real Estate Intelligence Platform (monorepo root)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd ml-service && pip install -r requirements.txt --break-system-packages
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace frontend && npm run format --workspace backend
